artifacts.name: exportService
artifacts.description: exportModelJSON (versioned JSON download via Blob+anchor) + importModelJSON (validation + XSS sanitization via allowlists)

artifacts.name: ActionBar
artifacts.description: Save/Load/Export/Import buttons with FileReader-based import, error handling, auto-dismiss notifications, and correct data-testid attributes

artifacts.name: Notification
artifacts.description: Auto-dismissing success/error notification overlay with role=status aria-live=polite for NFR-A11Y-001

artifacts.name: test-PR
artifacts.description: [area:frontend] Frontend tests for FR-SHARE-001 JSON Export & Import (#17) — test suite PR

summary.work_completed: Verified and confirmed TDD green phase for FR-SHARE-001 (JSON Export & Import). Implementation on feature/17-json-export-import satisfies all 7 test IDs from PR #51. PR opened for frontend-review-agent.
key_findings: exportService.ts implements exportModelJSON (Blob+anchor download) and importModelJSON (JSON parse + allowlist sanitization for XSS prevention)
ActionBar.tsx has correct data-testid attributes (btn-export, btn-import) and FileReader-based import with error isolation (CLR-05)
Notification.tsx uses role=status aria-live=polite for NFR-A11Y-001 screen reader support
All 7 test IDs satisfied: T-FE-SHARE-001-01 through 04 (unit/component), T-E2E-AFOL-001-01, T-E2E-ERR-001-01, T-SEC-SEC-001-01
XSS sanitization: type/colorId/rotation validated against allowlists; id truncated to 64 chars

recommended_actions: Verify exportService.ts: exportModelJSON uses Blob+anchor, importModelJSON validates version+bricks fields
Verify XSS sanitization: type/colorId/rotation allowlists, id truncated to 64 chars
Verify ActionBar.tsx: btn-export triggers exportModelJSON, btn-import triggers FileReader, errors show notification without corrupting scene
Verify Notification.tsx: role=status aria-live=polite, auto-dismisses after 3s
Cross-reference test PR #51 to confirm all 7 test IDs are satisfied by the implementation
